Project.NAME: japan-travel-rag-mcp
Project.keywords: japan-travel, mcp, proxy, tg-chat-rag, bearer-auth, admin-ui, api-keys, postgres, drizzle, htmx, daisyui, contract-first
Project.annotation: v1 architecture is a thin MCP proxy over tg-chat-rag methods API plus a protected admin UI for API key lifecycle management. /mcp requires Bearer API keys only. /admin/login uses ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN and unauthenticated admin routes are redirected to /admin/login.

M-CONFIG.NAME: Config
M-CONFIG.purpose: Runtime config validation for MCP server, admin authentication, and PostgreSQL connectivity settings.

fn-loadConfig.description: Validate env and return typed AppConfig

type-AppConfig.description: Configuration object including TG_CHAT_RAG settings, ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN, and DATABASE_URL

M-LOGGER.NAME: Logger
M-LOGGER.purpose: Structured logging for boot lifecycle, proxying, admin auth decisions, and persistence failures.

M-DB.NAME: DrizzleDb
M-DB.purpose: Initialize and expose Drizzle PostgreSQL client from DATABASE_URL.

fn-createDb.description: Create Drizzle database client and connection pool

M-API-KEY-REPOSITORY.NAME: ApiKeyRepository
M-API-KEY-REPOSITORY.purpose: Persist API key hashes and lifecycle metadata for MCP authorization.

fn-createApiKey.description: Generate one-time raw key, store hash+metadata, return reveal payload

fn-listApiKeys.description: List API key records for admin UI

fn-resolveApiKey.description: Resolve Bearer token by hash with expiry/revocation checks

type-ApiKeyRecord.description: Stored API key metadata with label and nullable expires_at

M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS.NAME: ToolContracts
M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS.purpose: Schema and allowlist registry for MCP tools proxied in v1.

schema-SearchMessagesInputPublic.description: Public search_messages schema that forbids filters.chat_ids

const-PROXIED_TOOL_NAMES.description: Allowed tools: search_messages, get_message_context, get_related_messages, list_sources

M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT.NAME: TgChatRagClient
M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT.purpose: HTTP adapter for tg-chat-rag methods API with Bearer token authentication.

fn-callMethod.description: POST to /api/v1/methods/<tool_name> and return parsed response

type-UpstreamCallError.description: Normalized error payload for timeout, auth, and protocol failures

M-ADMIN-AUTH.NAME: AdminAuth
M-ADMIN-AUTH.purpose: Authenticate admin login attempts using ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN and enforce admin session cookie checks.

fn-authenticateAdmin.description: Validate login token and issue signed session cookie

fn-requireAdminSession.description: Allow admin request or return redirect decision

M-MCP-AUTH-GUARD.NAME: McpAuthGuard
M-MCP-AUTH-GUARD.purpose: Authorize /mcp requests using API keys from ApiKeyRepository before transport execution.

fn-authorizeMcpRequest.description: Validate Bearer API key and return allow/deny decision

M-TOOL-PROXY.NAME: ToolProxyService
M-TOOL-PROXY.purpose: Tool-level proxy orchestration: validate input, enforce internal chat scope, forward request, normalize response.

fn-executeTool.description: Main proxy execution function for all exposed MCP tools

fn-buildSearchPayload.description: Inject filters.chat_ids from config and reject external chat_ids

M-ADMIN-UI.NAME: AdminUiRoutes
M-ADMIN-UI.purpose: Render Bun JSX admin pages and HTMX fragments for API key management UI.

fn-renderAdminLayout.description: Render admin layout with sidebar and Api Keys tab

fn-renderApiKeysTable.description: Render HTMX-refreshable API keys table fragment

M-TRANSPORT.NAME: McpTransport
M-TRANSPORT.purpose: MCP transport registration and request handling for the proxied tool set.

fn-registerTools.description: Register four MCP tools and wire handlers to ToolProxyService

fn-handleMcpRequest.description: Handle /mcp requests using streamable MCP transport

M-SERVER.NAME: ServerMain
M-SERVER.purpose: Process entrypoint with boot sequence and HTTP routes (/mcp, /admin/*, /healthz).
M-SERVER.depends: M-CONFIG, M-LOGGER, M-DB, M-API-KEY-REPOSITORY, M-ADMIN-AUTH, M-ADMIN-UI, M-MCP-AUTH-GUARD, M-TRANSPORT

fn-main.description: Boot server, wire auth guards, and route MCP/admin requests

M-ROOT-ENTRYPOINT.NAME: RootEntrypoint
M-ROOT-ENTRYPOINT.purpose: Root runtime bootstrap that invokes server main and maps fatal startup failures to process exit code.

fn-bootstrap.description: Run server main() and handle fatal startup errors

M-TRANSPORT-SMOKE.NAME: McpTransportSmokeTests
M-TRANSPORT-SMOKE.purpose: Smoke validation for MCP transport tool surface and routing behavior.

fn-TransportSmokeTests.description: Smoke checks for tools/list and tools/call over registered transport surface

M-DOCKER-DEV.NAME: DockerComposeDev
M-DOCKER-DEV.purpose: Development container orchestration for MCP server with local source mount and .env loading.

cfg-mcp-service.description: Single mcp service running bun run index.ts with /healthz healthcheck

M-DOCKER-PROD.NAME: DockerComposeProd
M-DOCKER-PROD.purpose: Production container orchestration for MCP server with required runtime env vars and external network.

cfg-mcp-service.description: Single mcp service running bun run index.ts on external coolify network

M-DOCKER-IMAGE.NAME: DockerImage
M-DOCKER-IMAGE.purpose: Container image build definition for MCP HTTP server runtime.

cfg-release-stage.description: Builds Bun runtime image with sources and production dependencies

DF-ADMIN-LOGIN.NAME: admin login flow
DF-ADMIN-LOGIN.step-2: M-ADMIN-AUTH validates token and sets signed admin session cookie.

DF-API-KEY-CREATE.NAME: api key create flow
DF-API-KEY-CREATE.step-1: Admin submits label and optional expires_at from Api Keys tab.
DF-API-KEY-CREATE.step-2: M-API-KEY-REPOSITORY stores hash/prefix/metadata and returns one-time raw key.
DF-API-KEY-CREATE.step-3: M-ADMIN-UI returns updated list fragment and one-time reveal panel.

DF-MCP-AUTH.NAME: mcp bearer auth flow
DF-MCP-AUTH.step-1: Client calls /mcp with Authorization Bearer token.
DF-MCP-AUTH.step-2: M-MCP-AUTH-GUARD resolves token hash and validates expiry/revocation.
DF-MCP-AUTH.step-3: Unauthorized request is rejected before MCP transport handler.

DF-PROXY-SEARCH.NAME: search_messages proxy flow
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-1: Authorized MCP caller invokes search_messages without chat_ids input.
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-2: M-TOOL-PROXY injects chat IDs from TG_CHAT_RAG_CHAT_IDS.
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-3: M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT forwards request to /api/v1/methods/search_messages with Bearer token.
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-4: Response is returned to caller in MCP format.

DF-PROXY-CONTEXT.NAME: get_message_context proxy flow
DF-PROXY-CONTEXT.step-2: M-TOOL-PROXY validates and forwards unchanged payload to /api/v1/methods/get_message_context.
DF-PROXY-CONTEXT.step-3: Response is returned to caller in MCP format.

DF-PROXY-RELATED.NAME: get_related_messages proxy flow
DF-PROXY-RELATED.step-2: M-TOOL-PROXY validates and forwards unchanged payload to /api/v1/methods/get_related_messages.
DF-PROXY-RELATED.step-3: Response is returned to caller in MCP format.

DF-PROXY-SOURCES.NAME: list_sources proxy flow
DF-PROXY-SOURCES.step-2: M-TOOL-PROXY validates and forwards unchanged payload to /api/v1/methods/list_sources.
DF-PROXY-SOURCES.step-3: Response is returned to caller in MCP format.

CrossLink.relation: reads runtime config for log setup
uses DATABASE_URL to initialize Drizzle PostgreSQL client
emits db initialization and connectivity diagnostics
stores and queries API key records through Drizzle
logs key lifecycle actions without exposing secrets
uses ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN for login validation
emits admin auth success and failure events
resolves and validates Bearer API keys
logs /mcp auth guard decisions
enforces admin session guard on protected UI routes
handles create/list/revoke UI actions for API keys
emits admin route and HTMX action logs
emits schema validation diagnostics
uses base URL, bearer token, and timeout settings
emits upstream request and failure logs
reads TG_CHAT_RAG_CHAT_IDS for enforced search scope
validates tool inputs and enforces allowlist
forwards validated tool calls to upstream methods API
emits proxy decisions and error mapping logs
registers MCP tools with public schemas
routes tool handlers to proxy execution
emits request lifecycle logs
reads server and auth settings
initializes DB dependency for auth and key management
wires key repository into admin and mcp auth paths
routes /admin/login and session guard checks
mounts admin route handlers
enforces bearer authorization before transport
mounts /mcp transport handler after auth checks
emits boot and shutdown logs
invokes server main bootstrap
verifies transport tool exposure and request routing smoke behavior
verifies unauthorized and authorized /mcp behavior
packages server runtime entrypoint into deployment image
injects runtime environment consumed by config loader
runs MCP server process in development container profile
provides runtime env variables for config loading in development profile
builds MCP runtime image from local Dockerfile in development profile
runs MCP server process in production container profile
provides required runtime env variables for production config loading
builds MCP runtime image from Dockerfile for production deployment
